name: 14_magnitude_boundary_inclusive
description: Boundary: current_return == stop_trigger_level - MAGNITUDE_FLOOR_PCT exactly. The inline producer uses `<=` so the boundary is INCLUSIVE -- this tick qualifies.
derivation: Guard passes. Magnitude: current_return -1.10 <= (stop_trigger_level -1.0) - MAGNITUDE_FLOOR_PCT(0.10) = -1.10. -1.10 <= -1.10 is TRUE (inclusive). MC: 30.0 < 60.0 is TRUE. Condition met. new_count = 0 + 1 = 1; hit = False. The values chosen here yield an EXACT float boundary (-1.0 - 0.10 = -1.1 represented identically in IEEE-754 for the chosen inputs); an impl that mistakenly used `<` instead of `<=` would reset to 0 here.
